description: Criminalità in Puglia refers to organized crime groups operating in the Apulia region of Italy, emerging in the early 1980s. The main organizations are the Società foggiana, Bari-based crime groups, and the Sacra Corona Unita. These groups engage in extortion, theft, robbery, drug trafficking, and money laundering, often targeting businesses and public funds. The organizations are characterized by strong territorial control and are in continuous evolution.
